boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: REL-AST-081 pending; STD-AST-081-P requires exact match

final_answer: Action may not proceed. REL-AST-081 shows active cabinet/handler controls remain pending for AS-44 solvent. STD-AST-081-P requires execution release to match material, quantity, facility, PO, and hazard-control status exactly. Generic warning and pending status leave boundary open. Escalate for proof of hazard controls before any purchase execution.
